programs.title: Becker
programs.desc: Becker's habit of not being very vocal unless he's on a rant is bothering Chris, who complains about his communication skills; Linda falls for a father and his son who are both named Steve; Hector's bid to invest in coffee futures goes unheeded.

programs.title: Good Chef Bad Chef
programs.desc: Good Chef Bad Chef presents viewers with a range of both healthy and indulgent recipes and meal ideas and lets them decide what is right for them.

programs.title: Frasier
programs.desc: The Botched Language of Cranes: After publicly denouncing Seattle as a 'soggy' city, Frasier must battle the angry words and 'gifts' of die-hard Seattleites.

programs.title: Frasier
programs.desc: Frasier agrees to make a television commercial for his candidate of choice in a local election, only to learn some very distressing information moments before they film.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: The gang are concerned when Sheldon's former admirer, Dr Ramona Nowitzki, resurfaces while Amy is away at Princeton.

programs.title: The Big Bang Theory
programs.desc: Amy begins to have second thoughts about her response to Sheldon's proposal. Howard and Bernadette freak out over some life-changing news.
